name: Oyster and Brie Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Brie cheese, cut into small wedges, skin off
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large soup pot, melt one stick of butter.
2. Add the celery, onions, white pepper, and cayenne. Stir and cook over low heat until vegetables begin to soften.
3. In another pan, make a roux by combining 8 tablespoons melted butter and the flour. Cook at least 2 minutes, stirring constantly, so the floury taste is eliminated.
4. Add the roux and cheese to the soup pot.
5. Add the water, cream, oysters, and their liquid. Simmer the soup until the oysters begin to curl.
6. Add the champagne and sherry and heat through.
